name: GK
subject: checking on this?
body:
Need an update here--can you let me know where we stand?
| | |
---
Hey Peter, checking in about something before I forget--
We've got just a few days until Kirsten's CNN town hall (and our first fundraising deadline of this quarter), and we have to show serious progress at every turn. Staying on track means bringing in **5,000 more donors before Tuesday** , and we can't make our goal without you:
| | **EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**DONATION STATUS:** PENDING
**NEXT STEP:****[Make your first donation to become a founding member, get Kirsten on the debate stage and power this campaign forward to defeat Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976da7/2ae112ef/6c0d260d/357da0c6/21664630/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMTYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3016-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
**DEADLINE:** TUESDAY
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976da7/2ae112ef/6c0d260d/357da0c6/21664630/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMTYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3016-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
We have a steep uphill battle ahead of us to stay competitive in a field this crowded. Hitting our first goal and having you on board means this: Kirsten can campaign in more early states. We can build the strongest volunteer teams to connect with more voters. We can spread our message by securing Kirsten's spot on the national debate stage.
Your gift today to hit our goal is the only way we can do everything we need to power our movement forward tomorrow. We need 5,000 more donors before Tuesday--and every membership gets Kirsten one step closer to the debate stage. **[We need you to power this people-first campaign before Tuesday's deadline. No corporate PACs, no federal lobbyists, no fossil fuel money, no super PACs--we're counting on you to donate now.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976da7/2ae112ef/6c0d260d/357da0c6/21664630/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMTYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3016-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3016-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| [Donate $25](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3016-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3016-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| [Other](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976da7/2ae112ef/6c0d260d/357da0c6/21664630/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMTYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3016-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
Talk to you soon,

Gavrie Kullman
Digital Fundraising Director
Gillibrand 2020
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976da7/2ae112ef/6c0d260d/357da0c2/21664630/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
---

name: Andrew Janz
subject: FWD: Devin Nunes is intimidated by a cow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Hey, I want to make sure you saw this message from #TeamCow at the Voter Protection Project. Will you help usu stand up for free speech and for our right to vote by chipping into @DevinCow's legal defense fund?- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter-- I want to make sure you saw this message from #TeamCow at the Voter Protection Project. Will you help us stand up for free speech and for our right to vote by chipping into @DevinCow's legal defense fund? **[If Nunes's ludicrous lawsuit against the Twitter cow is dropped, ALL proceeds will go toward helping us defeat him in CA-22 next year:](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089c4/1608175279/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+If+Nunesrsquos+ludicrous+lawsuit+against&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")** | | | [Contribute -> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089c7/1608175279/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+rarr+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
---
We're in this together!
\-- Andrew
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: #TeamCow (via Voter Protection Project)
Date: Tue, Apr 2, 2019 at 3:46 PM
Subject: Devin Nunes is intimidated by a cow@protectvoting.org>
Greetings, friends!
As you may know by now, Rep. Devin Nunes is SUING @DevinCow and Twitter for 250 MILLION DOLLARS, claiming that a few online jokes have caused him steer-ious harm.
**And it looks like @DevinCow isn 't the ONLY bovine speaking up:**
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089c6/1608175279/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
[**We 're raising money toward @DevinCow's legal defense fund -- But if the lawsuit is thrown out, we'll moo-ve all the money towards backing Nunes's challenger in 2020 >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089c9/1608175279/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Wersquore+raising+money+toward+DevinCowr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
| | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089c8/1608175279/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")

| | [Chip in $50 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089cb/1608175279/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&amount=50&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Chip+in+50+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")

| | [Chip in $100 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089ca/1608175279/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&amount=100&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+100+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
---
| | [Chip in $200 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089cd/1608175279/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&amount=200&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+Chip+in+200+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
---
| | [Chip in $250 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089cc/1608175279/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&amount=250&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+Chip+in+250+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
---
| | [Other Amount ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089cf/1608175279/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+Other+Amount+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
---
_**Nunes might be having a cow right now**_ _**....**_
....but with your support, we'll be able to retire Nunes, halt his hyper-partisan right-wing cronies, stand up for free speech, and obstruct the GOP's agenda of limiting voter protection.
If you're able to spare just $5 or $10, you can help us stand up for free speech and send Nunes on to greener pastures in his upcoming election:
[**Chip in to help us fund The Cow 's legal defense and retire Devin Nunes >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/610089ce/1608175279/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiIFZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA0MDdfVGVhbUNvd19VMV9YMSJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode= VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&amount=10&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=11+-+Chip+in+to+help+us+fund+The+Cowrsquos+le&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
We're ready to moo-bilize against hate and intimidation, and we hope you are too!
In solidarity,
_Voter Protection Project_

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/61008931/1608175279/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=12+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
---
| | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/61008930/1608175279/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=13+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/61008933/1608175279/VEsHAQ/ "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0794/72412298/44fbe443/61008932/1608175279/VEsHAA/ "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=15+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190407_TeamCow_U1_X1")

And it looks like @DevinCow isn 't the ONLY bovine speaking up: "= VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utmmedium=email&utmsource=voterprotect&utmcontent=3&utmcampaign=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&source=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1" "= VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utmmedium=email&utmsource=voterprotect&utmcontent=4+-+Wersquore+raising+money+toward+DevinCowr&utmcampaign=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&source=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1" | | "= VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utmmedium=email&utmsource=voterprotect&utmcontent=5+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utmcampaign=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&source=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1" | | "= VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&amount=50&recurring=auto&utmmedium=email&utmsource=voterprotect&utmcontent=6+-+Chip+in+50+rarr&utmcampaign=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&source=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1" | | "= VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&amount=100&recurring=auto&utmmedium=email&utmsource=voterprotect&utmcontent=7+-+Chip+in+100+rarr&utmcampaign=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&source=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1" | | "= VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&amount=200&recurring=auto&utmmedium=email&utmsource=voterprotect&utmcontent=8+-+Chip+in+200+rarr&utmcampaign=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&source=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1" | | "= VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&amount=250&recurring=auto&utmmedium=email&utmsource=voterprotect&utmcontent=9+-+Chip+in+250+rarr&utmcampaign=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&source=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1" | | "= VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&recurring=auto&utmmedium=email&utmsource=voterprotect&utmcontent=10+-+Other+Amount+rarr&utmcampaign=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&source=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1" Nunes might be having a cow right now .... ....but with your support, we'll be able to retire Nunes, halt his hyper-partisan right-wing cronies, stand up for free speech, and obstruct the GOP's agenda of limiting voter protection. If you're able to spare just $5 or $10, you can help us stand up for free speech and send Nunes on to greener pastures in his upcoming election: "= VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&amount=10&recurring=auto&utmmedium=email&utmsource=voterprotect&utmcontent=11+-+Chip+in+to+help+us+fund+The+Cowrsquos+le&utmcampaign=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1&source=VPPEMFR190407TeamCowU1X1" We're ready to moo-bilize against hate and intimidation, and we hope you are too! In solidarity, Voter Protection Project | "" | | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Bernie 2020
subject: Where should we send your free sticker?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020 PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402 This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=980%2E150750%2ESbthZU)

Can we send you a free sticker?
[Add your name today to receive your FREE “Not me. Us.” sticker. [](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/free-not-me-us-sticker/?source=em190407-1-120&t=3&akid=980%2E150750%2ESbthZU) [GET YOUR STICKER](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/free-not-me-us-sticker/?source=em190407-1-120&t=4&akid=980%2E150750%2ESbthZU) Our campaign is about building an unprecedented grassroots movement to win this election and transform our country. By signing up to get your free “Not me. Us.” sticker, you’ll show that we are in that fight together. Bernie cannot do it alone. [Tell us where to send your FREE “Not me. Us.” sticker by adding your name today.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/free-not-me-us-sticker/?source=em190407-1-120&t=5&akid=980%2E150750%2ESbthZU) They may have the money, but we have the people. And as long as we are united, there is nothing we cannot accomplish. In solidarity, Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2020 PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402 This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=980%2E150750%2ESbthZU). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=980%2E150750%2ESbthZU). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=980_150750_SbthZU&akid=980%2E150750%2ESbthZU). Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=9&akid=980%2E150750%2ESbthZU).

name: Kirsten
subject: Just got back from NH and want to check in on something
body:
Peter,
I just got back from my latest trip to New Hampshire and want to check in with you on something really quick. I know our team is working overtime to bring in 5,000 new donors before I take the stage for my CNN town hall Tuesday night.
**[I have to ask: Can you become a founding member of our team by making your first donation to my campaign before Tuesday night? Your gift helps keep me out on the road meeting voters and building the strongest people-powered campaign possible.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976e44/2ae112ef/6c1c1bfd/357ddc3f/2329326990/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMjEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3021-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3021-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3021-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3021-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976e44/2ae112ef/6c1c1bfd/357ddc3f/2329326990/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMjEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3021-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
We're not taking money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or fossil fuel executives, and we don't have an individual super PAC. So my ability to meet folks on the road and ask them in person to be a part of this campaign is really, really important.
I have the honor and privilege to hear from them about the issues that are on their minds--most often, it's the rising cost of health care, keeping our schools and communities safe from gun violence and protecting our environment for the next generation. And I'm looking forward to addressing these issues and more on Tuesday night.
**Before I take the stage, please give any amount you can --$1, $5 or $10--to become one of 5,000 new donors we're aiming to bring in before Tuesday. Every dollar helps:**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email**](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976e44/2ae112ef/6c1c1bfd/357ddc3f/2329326990/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMjEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3021-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
I hope you can tune in Tuesday night!
Thanks for everything,
Kirsten
P.S. Here's a photo from our meet-and-greet in Dover this weekend. I love meeting voters on the road and hope to meet you soon--if I haven't yet!
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976e44/2ae112ef/6c1c1bfd/357ddc3f/2329326990/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMjEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3021-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976e44/2ae112ef/6c1c1bfd/357ddc3b/2329326990/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.
